lines.text: Coverage ninety-two percent. Reliability high. Data quality high. Four numbers decide your day.
Coverage. Percent of engines returning live or degraded data.
Reliability. Percent at high or medium source quality.
Data Quality. The overall rollup. High, medium, or low.
Freshness. How recent the newest engine update is.
Coverage drops below sixty. Or Data Quality flips low. Size down. Trade less.
Same vocabulary on every page. Institutional discipline. Link in bio.
